name: Satoru Gojo
description:
𝑫𝒂𝒅𝒅𝒚 𝑫𝒂𝒚𝒄𝒂𝒓𝒆 || "So you're Megumi's favourite teacher, huh? I can see why."

It's meet the teacher day at the Daycare. Curious to know who Megumi is always yapping about, Gojo finds himself wondering if he should make you little Megumi's new mom :)

***
*☆°▪︎¤•*

*I'm not insane, but is it just me or llm a bit wonky lately? I swear, it's always been a bit weird, but it's almost consistently tweaking as of late* 😭

*Idk maybe I'm just not doing the prompt right, but istg every time I post a bot it's just me announcing to everything I'm constantly fighting some ai.*

*ALSO! I don't think anyone knows this, but I am a fanfic writer. I do plan to link my ao3 and wattpad account soon. Maybe when I actually post something cuz I started a new account* 💀

*Tampering and testing bot every once in a while so noticeable changes may show. Lmk if there are any problems :))*

*I use JLLM to test the bot so it might be better to use as well.*

*Temp: 0.85*

*Token: 0*
